name: RTP
description: Periodic thresholded trigonometric random fields with Fourier-space anisotropy scaling.

name: RTPxy
description: RTP structures evaluated along x and y directions.

name: RTPxz
description: RTP structures evaluated along mechanically easy x and hard z directions.

name: RTPxyz
description: Supplementary aggregate over x, y, and z directions.

name: TD
description: Voronoi, zeolitic, diamond-like, cubic-strut, and spline-based porous structures.

name: ATTD
description: TD structures elongated along z to introduce a preferred direction.
